name: Spanakopitta Me Avga (Spinach Pie W/eggs)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash spinach thoroughly in plenty of water and cut into small pieces; place in a bowl. Salt lightly and stir to spread salt evenly.
2. Squeeze the spinach by handfuls, removing excess water, and place it in another bowl.
3. Saute onion in half the butter until light golden; add scallions and cook until wilted. Add spinach and cook until vegetables have a light color.
4. Stir in dill, parsley, salt, and pepper; cover pot and cook until all absorbed by spinach. Remove from heat; add milk to cool the spinach mixture.
5. Beat eggs in another bowl; add crumbled cheese. Mix well with cooled spinach.
6. Line an ungreased pan with 8 sheets of phyllo dough, brushing each sheet with melted butter before adding the next.
7. Pour spinach mixture evenly over phyllo and fold the excess back over the filling.
8. Lay remaining phyllo on top, brushing each sheet with melted butter before adding the next.
9. Trim overlap; brush additional melted butter on top.
10. Score into square or diamond-shaped serving pieces. Bake for 30 to 45 minutes in a preheated oven at 300°F; let stand for 30 minutes before serving.
NOTE: Spinach can also be prepared without precooking. Squeeze excess water, mix with seasonings, and proceed as above, baking for 1 hour.
